# Facets

> Next.js news verifier + India RSS coverage feed. Convex backend, Clerk auth, OpenCode Big Pickle for fact-check.

## Stack
- Next.js 16 (App Router)
- Convex (RSS, stories, verify, billing)
- Clerk
- Optional client search: Exa / Tavily (`NEXT_PUBLIC_EXA_API_KEY`, `NEXT_PUBLIC_TAVILY_API_KEY`)
- Vitest for unit tests

## Key routes
- `/` — verify
- `/feed` — clustered stories (RSS + Exa widen)
- `/blindspot` — skewed coverage feed
- `/result/[slug]` — saved verification
- `/dashboard` — history

## Docs (repo)
- `docs/STATUS.md` — stack, commands, pre-prod checklist
- `docs/LOCAL_DEV.md` — dev setup
- `docs/ENV.md` — env vars
- `docs/FEED_PIPELINE.md` — RSS + Exa ingest
- `docs/GROUND_NEWS_GAP_PLAN.md` — product parity notes
